body.title: Bus — comms:// routing (the only thing that speaks IMAP)
body.summary: Owns comms:// routing; nothing outside bus/ speaks IMAP directly, so swapping the transport touches only bus/. Receive is IDLE PUSH, not polling: a device's bus-facing component runs an idle_wait loop in a background thread (started by shim.start()); on a message it wakes, fetch_unseen(), dispatches. Request/response is built in — every envelope carries from_device + to_device; reply by appending to the target and letting the caller's idle_wait deliver it (no RPC library). The announce -> manifest flow is the canonical live example.

key_concepts.name: IDLE push
key_concepts.what: IMAPServer.idle_wait(mailbox) is the receive primitive; AnnounceListener.run_forever() is the ~15-line canonical loop

key_concepts.name: envelope
key_concepts.what: from_device + to_device on every message; reply_to in the payload by convention when the reply address differs

key_concepts.name: transport decoupling
key_concepts.what: swap IMAP for another transport by touching only bus/

key_concepts.name: announce pipeline shape
key_concepts.what: agent sends a small identity envelope to comms://announce/inbox; datacenter resolves a static profile for that agent type, intersects it with the live device registry, and ships back a dynamic manifest

key_concepts.name: manifest is the assembly source
key_concepts.what: the agent uses the manifest to assemble its system prompt (Igor) or its MCP tool surface (CC) — one resolution, two surface adapters

key_concepts.name: idempotent, versioned, push-on-change
key_concepts.what: agents subscribe to comms://announce-events and re-pull on notification rather than polling; re-pull is safe to repeat

body.status_notes: | EXTENDED 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation): EXTEND, not new. The swarm-bus 'one bus, three transports (MCP/HTTP/IMAP)' framing from datacenter-swarm-bus-design is ALREADY represented across the existing bus + skeleton + device-shim + intent intent-points; that doc gets no separate draft (absorbed). Surface-adapter file paths named in the source doc (datacenter_client.py, announce_mcp.py) are pre-reorg/cross-repo and were NOT verified — reviewer should confirm against devices/claude/ and announce/ before adding any pointer.
